basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: IIT Indian School of Mines Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: IIT Indian School of Mines Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitism.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Reservation and Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH/Women candidates will be applicable as per the Government of India (GoI). A relaxation in the upper age limit will be given to SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy layer)/PH candidates as per GoI rule.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech / B.E. in Electronics /Electronics & Communication/ Electronics & Tele-communication
qualification.details: First Class or First Division with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA in B. Tech / B.E. or equivalent degree in Electronics / Electronics & Communication/ Electronics & Tele-communication.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT ISM Dhanbad Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate-I position at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate-I recruitment is 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech / B.E. degree in Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Tele-communication with a First Class or First Division (minimum 60% marks).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, depending on GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure you attach all required documents and clearly mention the post in the subject line.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT ISM Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT ISM Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: IIT ISM Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand, with the pincode 826004.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
